title: Toyota Is (Finally) Determined To Sell More BEVs In The US
description:
Despite the sharp U-turn in federal policy, Toyota has added a new home EV charging station partnership to its plans for selling more BEVs in the US.

The post Toyota Is (Finally) Determined To Sell More BEVs In The US appeared first on CleanTechnica.
